summary: Tested Admin Google Login endpoint (/api/admin/google-login) and migration script export functionality. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Admin Login UI working correctly with Google button visible and clickable.

integration_issues.issue: When Google auth callback fails on /admin/login#session_id=..., user is redirected to /auth (student login) instead of staying on /admin/login. Error toast shows correctly but redirect goes to wrong page.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix admin login callback error redirect to stay on /admin/login instead of /auth
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/admin/google-login correctly validates session_id (400 for empty, 401 for invalid)
Allowed admin emails are properly configured: seremonta.cl@gmail.com, admin@seremonta.cl
verify_admin_token function correctly handles both traditional (sub=username) and Google (type=admin_google) tokens
Migration script exported correct data: 2 courses, 2 chapters, 5 lessons, 9 questions, 10 formulas
Admin Login UI has Google button, traditional login form, and loading state for callback processing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Google Login endpoint is fully functional. Backend correctly rejects invalid/empty session_id. Frontend Admin Login page shows Google button and redirects to auth.emergentagent.com when clicked. Traditional username/password login works. Migration data exported to /app/backend/migration_data/ with correct counts.

3_google_login_rejects_unauthorized_emai.details: Endpoint configured to only allow seremonta.cl@gmail.com and admin@seremonta.cl

4_admin_ui_google_button_visible.details: Google login button 'Continuar con Google' is visible and clickable on /admin/login

5_admin_ui_loading_state.details: Loading state code exists but callback error redirects to /auth instead of /admin/login
